description:
In a nutshell, this command removes gaming [[Side]] (see [[createCenter]]). If a side has >0 [[Group]]s it cannot be deleted. Center can only be created for: [[east]], [[west]], [[resistance]], [[civilian]] and [[sideLogic]], therefore only centers from the mentioned sides can be deleted.

'''Old description:''' Destroys the AI center of the given side.
name: deleteCenter
